project_type: Next.js 16 App Router SPA with Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI components, PayPal integration
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to ensure no compile errors. 2. Check that the new PayPalOneTimeButton component renders without errors. 3. Verify LandedCostReport shows the one-time purchase flow when user is not Pro.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access. Node.js available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: Standard Next.js App Router conventions. Client components marked with 'use client'. Tailwind for styling.
key_patterns: - Client components use 'use client' directive. - PayPal integration uses @paypal/react-paypal-js with PayPalScriptProvider wrapping PayPalButtons. - Pro status checked via useProStatus() hook from lib/contexts/ProStatusContext. - Premium components live in components/premium/. - Calculators live in components/calculators/. - CSS uses Tailwind v4 with @import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css. - UI primitives from @/components/ui/ (Card, Button, Input, Label, Select).
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and layouts. components/ - React components (calculators/, premium/, ui/, features/, seo/). lib/ - Utilities, hooks, contexts, configs. tests/ - Playwright e2e tests. public/ - Static assets.
